title: Nextera DNA Flex Library Prep: Tagment DNA
author: Opentrons
materials: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: mastermix 1
steps.instruction: mastermix 1.5ml snapcap tubes (loaded empty, 1 tube needed per 48 samples) * A2-B

steps.title: BLT in 0
steps.instruction: BLT in 0.5ml false-bottom tubes (1 tube needed per 48 samples) * A3-B

steps.title: TB1 in 0
steps.instruction: TB1 in 0.5ml false-bottom tubes (1 tube needed per 48 samples) 200ul PCR strips (slot 3 **only needed if using P50 multi-channel pipette** * strip column

steps.title: Input the mount side for your...
steps.instruction: Input the mount side for your P50 single-channel pipette, whether you are using a P50 multi-channel pipette, the mount for your P50 multi-channel pipette (if applicable), and the number of samples to process.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
